transcript: This is what a typical courtroom looks like. Both criminal and civil cases are heard here every day. Most people know that judges preside over a courtroom and make the decisions, but there are others who play a role in court hearings, such as the clerk who assists the judge. In a criminal trial, the accused will be present, together with his or her defense lawyer who will defend him or her against the charges. The accused will be guarded by the bailiff.
